prediction.reasoning: Based on Boeing's historical volatility of approximately 2-3% daily and typical 7-day price movements, I estimate a modest upward trend given recent aerospace sector performance. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal price distribution with widening ranges to reflect increasing uncertainty over the 7-day horizon.
